formTemplate.description: Standard periodic inspection for overhead cranes (Single Girder, Double Girder, Gantry, Jib, Monorail)

questions.question_text: Festoon system and other crane cabling
Drive shafts, couplings and keys secure
Mechanical guards in place and secure
Hoist limit switch wiring and protection
Long travel anti-drop and anti-derailment fitted?
Cross travel anti-drop and anti-derailment fitted?

questions.options: {"Crane is Operational","Operate with Limitations","Unsafe to Operate"}
